column1: # /Worksheet Global Label — Left/Right/Center sets the default
# label-prefix used when the user types a label without an explicit
# prefix char. Doesn't touch any existing cells.
# /WGLR → Right alignment. Next unprefixed label lands as "hi.
# Existing A1 keeps its original 'hello prefix — the global change
# Undo unwinds the two global-label changes back to Left, plus the
# After undoing every change, A1 is empty again and default is Left.
